name: tiny-habits
description: BJ Fogg's Tiny Habits — behavior design system using B=MAP: build any habit by making it tiny, anchoring it, and celebrating
useCase: Helps users design habits that stick using the B=MAP model: start tiny, find the right anchor, and wire habits through celebration.
knownRisks: The Tiny Habits method works best when you pick behaviors you genuinely want — not what you think you should do
